question: What was the average bill Frank Wilkins received from Jennifer Harvey?
gold_sql: select avg(credit) from master_txn_table where customers = "Frank Wilkins" and transaction_type = 'bill' and vendor = "Jennifer Harvey"
original_generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(master_txn_table.Amount) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Frank Wilkins' AND customers.customer_full_name = 'Jennifer Harvey';

question: What was the first bill Jesus Snyder received from Roger Vega?
gold_sql: select min(credit) from master_txn_table where customers = "Jesus Snyder" and transaction_type = 'bill' and vendor = "Roger Vega"
original_generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT mt.transaction_id, mt.amount
FROM master_txn_table mt
JOIN customers c ON mt.Customers = c.customer_name
JOIN vendors v ON mt.Vendor = v.Vendor_name
WHERE c.customer_full_name = 'Jesus Snyder' AND v.Vendor_name = 'Roger Vega'
ORDER BY mt.Transaction_DATE ASC
LIMIT 1;

question: How much did William Jarvis spend on Loan Payable in July during last year?
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "William Jarvis" and instr(account,"Loan Payable") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')
original_generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'William Jarvis' 
  AND master_txn_table.Account = 'Loan Payable' 
  AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','-1 day') 
  AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','+30 days','-1 day');

question: Compare sales by customer Last year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days', 'start of year') AND date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days')  group by customers
original_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS last_year_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS current_year_sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name

question: Compare sales by customer Last year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days', 'start of year') AND date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days')  group by customers
original_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS last_year_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS current_year_sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name

question: Compare sales by customer Last year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days', 'start of year') AND date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days')  group by customers
original_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS last_year_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS current_year_sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name

question: How much did Meagan Smith spend on Baby carriers in July during last year?
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Meagan Smith" and instr(account,"Baby carriers") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')
original_generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
JOIN products ON master_txn_table.Product_Service = products.Product_Service 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Meagan Smith' 
AND products.Product_Service = 'Baby carriers' 
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','+30 days','-1 day');

FROM master_txn_table mt
JOIN customers c ON mt.Customers = c.customer_name
JOIN vendors v ON mt.Vendor = v.Vendor_name
WHERE c.customer_full_name = 'Crystal Franco' AND v.Vendor_name = 'Timothy Davis' 
ORDER BY mt.Transaction_DATE DESC 
LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT mt.transaction_id, mt.amount
FROM master_txn_table mt
JOIN customers c ON mt.Customers = c.customer_name

ORDER BY mt.Transaction_DATE ASC

question: How much did Hannah Cook spend on Accounts Receivable (A/R) in July during last year?
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Hannah Cook" and instr(account,"Accounts Receivable (A/R)") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')
original_generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 months','-1 day') 
AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 months','+30 days','-1 day') 
AND Customers = 'Hannah Cook' 
AND Transaction_TYPE = 'A/R';

question: What was the highest bill Lauren Wall received from George Smith?

SELECT MAX(master_txn_table.Amount) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'George Smith' AND employees.Employee_name = 'Lauren Wall';

question: Compare sales by customer Last year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days', 'start of year') AND date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days')  group by customers
original_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS last_year_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS current_year_sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name

original_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS last_year_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS current_year_sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name

question: Compare sales by customer Last year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days', 'start of year') AND date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days')  group by customers
original_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS last_year_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS current_year_sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name

original_generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) AS Monthly_Spend
FROM master_txn_table

FROM master_txn_table

question: How much did Michael Bryant spend on Loan Payable in July during last year?
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Michael Bryant" and instr(account,"Loan Payable") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')

SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
JOIN chart_of_accounts ON master_txn_table.businessID = chart_of_accounts.businessID 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Michael Bryant' 
AND chart_of_accounts.Account_name = 'Loan Payable' 
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','+30 days','-1 day');

question: How much did Susan Hensley spend on Loan Payable in July during last year?

    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS current_year_sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN

question: How much did Bill Mathews spend on Baby clothing and footwear in July during last year?

question: How many attached and detached units did we sell to Ashley Horton Last year?
gold_sql: select sum(quantity) from master_txn_table where customers = "Ashley Horton" and product_service = 'attached and detached units' and transaction_type in ('invoice', 'sales receipt') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days', 'start of year') AND date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days')
original_generated_sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Transaction_TYPE = 'attached' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS attached_units,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Transaction_TYPE = 'detached' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS detached_units
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    customers.customer_full_name = 'Ashley Horton' 
    AND strftime('%Y', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year');

repair_request.question: How many attached and detached units did we sell to Ashley Horton Last year?
repair_request.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Transaction_TYPE = 'attached' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS attached_units,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Transaction_TYPE = 'detached' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS detached_units
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    customers.customer_full_name = 'Ashley Horton' 
    AND strftime('%Y', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year');

question: What was the first bill Sabrina Wright received from Robin Wright?
gold_sql: select min(credit) from master_txn_table where customers = "Sabrina Wright" and transaction_type = 'bill' and vendor = "Robin Wright"
original_generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT mt.transaction_id, mt.amount
FROM master_txn_table mt
JOIN customers c ON mt.Customers = c.customer_name
JOIN vendors v ON mt.Vendor = v.Vendor_name
WHERE c.customer_full_name = 'Sabrina Wright' AND v.Vendor_name = 'Robin Wright'
ORDER BY mt.Transaction_DATE ASC
LIMIT 1;

question: How much did Joshua Ruiz spend on Uncategorized Income in July during last year?
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Joshua Ruiz" and instr(account,"Uncategorized Income") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')

FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Joshua Ruiz' 
AND master_txn_table.Account = 'Uncategorized Income' 
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 months','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 months','+30 days','-1 day');

question: What was the first bill Caleb Price received from Christopher Raymond?
gold_sql: select min(credit) from master_txn_table where customers = "Caleb Price" and transaction_type = 'bill' and vendor = "Christopher Raymond"
original_generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT mt.transaction_id, mt.amount
FROM master_txn_table mt
JOIN customers c ON mt.Customers = c.customer_name
JOIN vendors v ON mt.Vendor = v.Vendor_name
WHERE c.customer_full_name = 'Caleb Price' AND v.Vendor_name = 'Christopher Raymond'
ORDER BY mt.Transaction_DATE ASC
LIMIT 1;
